---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve AudioNab
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

You can find the application log file at:

```
%LOCALAPPDATA%\AudioNab\audionab.log
```

Please attach the relevant log output or the entire log file if possible.

## Environment

- **AudioNab version:** [e.g. 2.5.0]
- **Windows version:** [e.g. Windows 11 23H2]
- **Python version:** [e.g. 3.11.9 or N/A if using installer]
- **FFmpeg version:** [e.g. 7.1]
- **Installation method:** [Installer / Standalone exe / Python source]

## Input file details (if conversion issue)

If this bug involves a file that failed to convert, please provide the following:

- **Format:** [e.g. WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A]
- **File size:** [e.g. 150 MB]
- **Recording software:** [e.g. Audacity, OBS, Windows Voice Recorder]
- **Was the recording interrupted or incomplete?** [Yes / No / Unknown]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
